violations.text: Halibut was observed thawed inside of the grill cooler drawer with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood products packaged in ROP shall be removed from original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed at 36 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from original packaging during the time of inspection. Proper thawing procedures reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the drawers on prep unit #1. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler ceiling and ventilation hood system for the dishwashing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The sink in the kitchen used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025
The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the walk-in cooler. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025

Tape was observed on door handles of low boy unit. Handles need to be repaired to manufactures instruction. Handles should be constructed of a material that is durable, easily cleanable and smooth. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

An excessive amount of dust was observed above cook line. High dusting needs to be done on a more frequent basis. Areas above food preparation shall be kept clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
